message:
feat(abi-tests): expand pwd_abi test coverage from 15 to 32 tests

Add tests for getpwent_r, getspnam/getspnam_r, getspent/getspent_r,
getsgent_r, getsgnam_r, fgetsgent/fgetsgent_r, sgetsgent/sgetsgent_r,
putsgent stub, plus edge cases for getpwuid_r (not found, ERANGE) and
additional field-level verification for getpwnam/getpwuid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
